CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK( product_line__c), "", IF(CONTAINS("DL:AIG:ECO:FAB:LOP:OTH:PHM:IR:PUF:UVP:UVS:ICP:LAA:TA:TEA:ABG:AGP:BLC:CDS:CE:CHM:DNH:DNP:DNV:DU:HID:ASO:LCM:MGA:MIG:MMB:NIR:OCC:PBC:PBG:PCS:PHV:PSN:SDS:TRX:UPA:LHO:WEB:UV:LC:MAS:AGN:BIZ:BMC:CPC:DNE:DNS:ESI:SVC:GCM:PER:EMV:DCS:DLS:DSS:PIV:FLR:AA:-DU:BLS:DDV:DEL:MMS:MBA:IMG:AM:DAB:DAO:EXT:FN:GM:IMF:LM:RVA:SKC:TXV:CHD:GC:BIM:CRS:RAM:MCO:SVO:SVA:FTF:MET:CHO:BIO:ASE:CDI:SSS:ADS:LCA:MZG:PCK", product_line__c), "APPLIED", IF(CONTAINS("MAO:CRT:NEO:PRE:APS:AWS:SPS:CSC:MDX:CRD:NLB:GSO:RES:BAR:DIAC:DLF:NTD:EIM:VNT:NAP:NMO:MOX:CLH:MFT:SGL:ILB:BBT:GSG:CCM:ONC:GEN:DIA:ICL:CMG:DNA:SDO:CHS:SBD:EDO:PCR:TLP:VIR:ARS:NEX:MSD:AGO:RHS:SDX:NPT:DIO:HMG:MLB:NEI:OXI:PHE:POC:SOC", product_line__c), "DIAGNOSTICS", IF(CONTAINS("ASY",product_line__c), "ILLUMINATION & DETECTION SERVICES", IF(CONTAINS("CHE:ESS:LIM:ELM:GPZ:ENT:QAS:AVS:AVC:ISS:DSK:SIG:IFO:ATT:SPL:SRV",product_line__c), "INFORMATICS", IF(CONTAINS("IDO:RSO:MPS:TIP:TKS:ANP:FGP:ARI:ARP:CSA:GIP:LVI:MLD:PGI:PRD:SCN:SPT:TOF:MOL:RRC:RRS:PBR:HCS:IAS:PCL:MMO:LSB:MCB:TIS:INV:CLR:NVS:TSC:EZR:QPS:TBR:RRD:HTS:DIS:CKP:LSO:SER:NUC:FAP:QTS:HCA:CSB:CVD:HBE:HBP:HCE:HDX:HOS:HRR:HZN",product_line__c), "LIFE SCIENCES", IF(CONTAINS("SCI:DEX:CMS:ASG:ASP:MIO",product_line__c), "MEDICAL IMAGING", IF(CONTAINS("ABI:AGT:OMV:TMO:OSO:WAT:OSAM:OSC:OSSS:OSIS:OSRL:OSAI",product_line__c), "ONESOURCE", IF(CONTAINS("HTSC:ZZZ:HHO:EHO:BEA",product_line__c), "UNCODED", "PRODUCT LINE IN QUESTION")))))))))
CustomField.label: BUSINESS UNIT
